products.name: Flight Training
products.descriptor: Customized pilot and maintainer training programs for ALIA aircraft

evidence.snippet:
Customized Training Programs
----------------------------
BETA has now qualified more than 30 company pilots in ALIA and has trained dozens of pilots and maintainers from the US Air Force, US Army, UPS, United Therapeutics, Bristow, Air New Zealand and more.
[CUSTOMIZE YOUR TRAINING](https://cta-service-cms2.hubspot.com/web-interactives/public/v1/track/click?encryptedPayload=AVxigLJGtAvmJ%2F3y%2BBbMGvd3FBdFVUfzfduW65tYGdtMKtHKseOpORKqdGllMkEGswFREWb%2FidpLHomQ%2B3bAZjrMnq33lwCKj8hZwLefTvdknIFFnqTYYQ5WpROhS%2BKTIdWp57zP2%2F%2FApnupHmn2P4MOas6BHkpqWEVFFH8JDERswIm6AUD9CeOSl0lotA%3D%3D&portalId=47449398)
